overall_goal: Navigate the mother kangaroo upward through platforms via reachable ladders to rescue the child at the top, while avoiding/punching local hazards and preserving the known stable-200 first-reward route.

skills.name: select_reachable_ladder
skills.purpose: Pick an active ladder whose bottom is on the same platform as the player and whose top is above the player, not just the closest in x.
activation_conditions: Player is not currently inside a ladder column (no significant x-overlap with any ladder)
There exists at least one ladder with ladder_active==1, abs((ladder_y+ladder_h) - (player_y+player_h)) < reach_y_tol, and ladder_y < player_y
completion_signals: A target ladder index is selected and stored as the current navigation goal
reward_terms: +w_select if a reachable ladder (bottom near player_bottom, top above player) is chosen
-w_wrong if the chosen ladder's bottom is far from player_bottom (abs(ladder_bottom_y - player_bottom_y) > reach_y_tol)
+w_upward proportional to clip((player_y - ladder_top_y)/screen_h, 0, 1) of the chosen ladder
anti_shortcuts: Choosing the ladder nearest in x without checking y-reach (this caused the start-ladder bug)
Choosing a ladder whose top is below the player (no upward progress)

skills.name: horizontal_traverse_to_ladder
skills.purpose: Move horizontally toward the selected ladder's center until the player x-overlaps it enough to climb.
activation_conditions: Player x-center is not within climb_x_band of ladder_center_x[target]
Player is on a platform (not mid-jump, not climbing)
completion_signals: Player overlap fraction with target ladder column exceeds min_overlap_frac
reward_terms: +w_approach * (prev_dx - cur_dx) clipped to [-c, c], where dx is |player_center_x - ladder_center_x[target]|
-w_wander if direction reverses without hazard nearby
anti_shortcuts: Oscillating LEFT/RIGHT in place (smoke run #2 failure)

skills.name: climb_ladder
skills.purpose: Issue UP (or UPFIRE if hazard near) while inside the ladder column until reaching the next platform, then dismount.
activation_conditions: Target ladder is selected and player x-overlap fraction with it >= min_overlap_frac (not a 1-pixel touch)
completion_signals: player_y decreases monotonically while in ladder column
reward_terms: +w_climb * max(0, prev_player_y - cur_player_y) bounded per step
+w_top_bonus when player_y crosses ladder_top_y (one-shot per ladder)
-w_premature_dismount if leaving ladder column before reaching near top
anti_shortcuts: Triggering UP when only 1-pixel x-overlap (debug-overlay bug)
Stalling at the top without dismounting

skills.name: avoid_local_hazards
skills.purpose: Detect nearby active monkeys, thrown coconuts, and falling coconuts; punch with FIRE when adjacent and aligned, otherwise sidestep.
activation_conditions: Any monkey_active[i]==1 with distance to player < hazard_radius
falling_coconut_active==1 and falling_coconut close in x to player
completion_signals: Hazard distance increases or hazard becomes inactive
reward_terms: +w_punch_safe if FIRE issued while a monkey is within punch_x_range and same row (|dy|<row_tol) — bounded and capped per episode to prevent farming
+w_dodge if hazard dy/dx grows after a sidestep
anti_shortcuts: Punch farming on lower-platform monkeys without ever climbing (trace #13)
Removing FIRE entirely and losing the stable-200 first-reward branch (note #14)

skills.name: preserve_first_reward_route
skills.purpose: Preserve the empirically validated stable-200 opening: approach lower-platform monkey near x≈132,y≈148 and use RIGHTFIRE branch when conditions match.
activation_conditions: Episode is early (no ladder yet climbed)
Player near starting region and a monkey threat matches the stable-200 trigger pattern (monkey to the right within punch_x_range, similar y)
completion_signals: First +200 reward event observed (proxy: monkey_active transitions 1->0 in the trigger zone)
Player progresses toward the x≈132 reachable ladder afterward
reward_terms: +w_preserve one-shot if RIGHTFIRE is issued in the documented trigger zone and a monkey deactivates shortly after
-w_disrupt if early-route changes prevent reaching the trigger zone within T_early steps
anti_shortcuts: Re-using this trigger repeatedly to farm score (cap one-shot)
Hard-coding exact pixel coordinates without parameter tolerance

skills.name: post_ladder_transition
skills.purpose: After dismounting a ladder, re-run ladder selection from the new platform and continue upward; do not stall at the previous ladder top.
activation_conditions: Player just crossed a ladder top (player_y <= prev_target_ladder_top + dismount_margin)
Player is now horizontally on a higher platform
completion_signals: A new reachable ladder is selected with ladder_top_y < current player_y
Horizontal traversal toward the new ladder begins
reward_terms: +w_transition when a new reachable ladder is selected within transition_steps after dismount
-w_stall if player_y stays within stall_band for stall_steps after a dismount
anti_shortcuts: Re-selecting the just-climbed ladder and going back down
Standing at top and getting hit by falling coconut (trace #10)

selection_rules: If any hazard within hazard_radius and aligned for punch -> avoid_local_hazards (punch or dodge).
Else if early episode and in first-route trigger zone and first_route_done_flag is False -> preserve_first_reward_route.
Else if player is inside a ladder column (overlap_fraction >= min_overlap_frac_climb) and not near top -> climb_ladder.
Else if just dismounted from a ladder top -> post_ladder_transition.
Else if a target ladder is selected but player not yet in its column -> horizontal_traverse_to_ladder.
skill_selector.fallback_behavior: Issue NOOP for one frame to re-evaluate; if still no target, move toward the screen-center x of any active reachable ladder; never default to UP-only or LEFT/RIGHT-only loops.

dense_reward_design.composition_rule: shaped = clip(sum_k w_k * skill_term_k, -R_max, R_max); final = real_env_reward + alpha * shaped, with alpha small and shaped per-step bounded so real reward dominates.
must_include: Bounded upward-progress term based on decrease in player_y
Ladder-reach correctness term (chosen ladder bottom near player_bottom AND top above player)
Hazard avoidance term tied to player_active staying 1
One-shot preservation bonus for the stable-200 first-route trigger
must_not_include: Naive Euclidean distance from player to child (ignores platforms/ladders)
Fruit-chasing rewards that override upward progress
Any reward for x-overlap < min_overlap_frac with a ladder (1-pixel touch trap)
dense_reward_design.real_reward_relationship: Shaped terms are proxies for real Kangaroo score and rescue: upward progress, correct ladder use, and survival are necessary conditions for reaching the child, which is the dominant real-reward event. Punch rewards are capped so CMA-ES cannot prefer farming over climbing.

alignment_risks: Punch farming on lower-platform monkeys producing high score with zero upward progress (trace #13).
Over-correction that removes the FIRE branch and destroys the stable-200 opening (note #14, #15).
1-pixel ladder x-overlap triggering UP and stalling (note #12).
Selecting nearest-x ladder without y-reach check (note #8).
Stalling at ladder top and dying to falling coconut (note #10).
implementation_notes: Compute player_bottom_y = player_y + player_h every step; never compare ladder bottoms to player_y directly.
Define ladder_overlap_fraction = max(0, min(player_x+player_w, ladder_x+ladder_w) - max(player_x, ladder_x)) / max(1, min(player_w, ladder_w)); require >= min_overlap_frac before climbing.
Reachability: ladder_active==1 AND abs((ladder_y+ladder_h) - (player_y+player_h)) < reach_y_tol AND ladder_y < player_y - min_upward_gain.
Keep first_route_done_flag as an in-policy latch (single bit) so the preservation bonus fires once per episode and cannot be farmed.
Cap punch-related shaped reward per episode (punch_reward_cap) to prevent CMA-ES from converging to farming.
All thresholds (reach_y_tol, climb_x_band, min_overlap_frac, hazard_radius, dismount_margin, trigger tolerances) are CMA-ES-tunable scalars; expose them as a flat parameter vector.
Patch post-200 behavior (climb + dismount + next-ladder selection + falling-coconut dodge) without modifying preserve_first_reward_route logic, per note #15.
